surfaces.label: Client-safe summary
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Isla Grant). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. Bank statement summaries are on the papers, but the full transaction export, source banking records, and beneficiary tracing material are still outstanding. Summaries alone do not show the full account picture.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
